nonsemantic_launch_preconditions.formal_output_mount: Start the dedicated full Docker shell with /DATA1 mounted read-write; the existing PushT runbook container is read-only and cannot hold formal artifacts.
nonsemantic_launch_preconditions.source_snapshot: After all seven semantic corrections are approved and implemented, materialize and verify the 717-file candidate snapshot before activation. The current candidate code SHA256 is 1fbf1bd9e81d3ba2d39934ceb699f3322c5500f56da88ca6b5d5a877374db5d8.

required_corrections.problem: The frozen solver is 2ab, but the selected CosmosPolicyHuman2Robot rectified-flow model exposes no solver_option and uses its RF sample_scheduler.
required_corrections.recommended_resolution: Freeze the native deterministic rectified-flow scheduler at 35 steps and its shift value; do not label it 2ab.
required_corrections.alternative: Change to an EDM model path that genuinely implements 2ab, then rerun P0 and all model/config contracts.

required_corrections.problem: workspace_clipping_count has pass value 0 but no immutable xyz bounds or clipping-versus-rejection rule is frozen.
required_corrections.required_resolution: Freeze explicit canonical xyz minimum/maximum bounds, provenance, margin, and out-of-bounds policy before inference.

required_corrections.problem: The four registered QUAL report nodes transitively cover only 27 of the 147 evaluation cells.
required_corrections.recommended_resolution: Freeze one additional full-matrix completion report that binds all 202 cell artifacts and all 147 evaluation hashes; retain the four QUAL reports for case selection.

required_corrections.problem: The lag-calibrated diagnostic uses query_offset=5 but its prepared contract still binds the t+1 derived-view manifest.
required_corrections.required_resolution: Materialize and hash a distinct lag-calibrated derived view, or rename/refreeze the variant as an offset-5 diagnostic on the t+1 view.

required_corrections.problem: Corruption names and severities are frozen, but exact deterministic model-input transforms, masks, and severe-invalid thresholds are not.
required_corrections.required_resolution: Freeze transform algorithms, seed derivation, affected tensors, mild/severe classification, and pre-model reject/mask receipts.

required_corrections.problem: G6 requires visual top-k Jaccard, while RES cells reuse the phase-retrieval parent and register no per-resolution visual retrieval artifacts or aggregation rule.
required_corrections.required_resolution: Bind per-resolution frozen-encoder visual rankings and freeze whether the 0.90 threshold applies per query, minimum, median, or mean.

required_corrections.problem: The immutable registry itself has formal_queue_allowed=false and p2_acceptance_allowed=false.
required_corrections.required_resolution: Freeze a separate activation artifact or a successor registry defining the exact conditions that change these flags after all preflight checks pass.

claim_boundary: This file is a correction proposal only. It does not mutate the frozen v1 protocol/supplement/registry and cannot authorize training.
